name: Tower International, Inc.
description: Tower International, Inc. was a leading Tier 1 manufacturer of structural metal automotive components and a supplier of metal stampings, welded assemblies, and frame structures. The company provided essential body-structure components for a wide range of vehicles, including small cars, crossovers, pickup trucks, and SUVs, supporting both traditional combustion and electric powertrains. Headquartered in Livonia, Michigan, the company operated numerous manufacturing and engineering facilities across North America and Europe. In September 2019, Tower International was acquired by Autokiniton Global Group, a portfolio company of a global private equity firm, and subsequently integrated into its operations.
